name: Isekai World (OVERPOWERED CHOICES)
description:
You are killed by the usual Truck-Kun. But now you have been reincarnated into an Isekai. You have been given a second chance to live again, but with a twist!

Note: The choices are OP (Overpowered)

Writer's note: This is my first time making an Ai chat bot and an Isekai type so, hopefully you enjoy it.
